title: big pearl/windcharge texture pack
description: This texture pack makes wind charges and ender pearls appear larger when they are on the ground, improving visibility. Ender pearls are also slightly bigger while in the air, but still look natural and not overly exaggerated.
body: This texture pack is designed to improve visibility in fast-paced and high-pressure situations, such as finals or intense PvP fights. Wind charges and ender pearls are made larger when they are on the ground, making them much easier to spot quickly when every second matters. Additionally, ender pearls are slightly increased in size while in the air, helping you track them better without making them look unnatural or distracting. Overall, the pack keeps a clean and balanced look while giving you a small but useful advantage in gameplay.
